top_signals.title: US industrial base is becoming stronger for wartime production, study finds
top_signals.summary: As recent conflicts consume weapons at a ferocious rate, America’s defense industrial base is becoming more prepared to sustain a major war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SK Hynix Slides More Than 20% in Two Days as AI Trade Unravels
top_signals.summary: SK Hynix Inc. extended its brutal selloff in Seoul on Tuesday, taking its two-day slump to more than 20% as a rout in global AI hardware stocks fueled fresh concerns that this year’s blockbuster rally in chipmakers had run too far, too fast.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: OPEC Cuts Demand Forecast Again as the Oil Market Starts Looking Past Hormuz
top_signals.summary: OPEC has trimmed its 2026 global oil demand growth forecast for the third straight month, even as crude production rebounds across the Gulf and tanker traffic slowly returns to the Strait of Hormuz. In its monthly oil market report released Monday, OPEC lowered expected oil demand growth this year to 780,000 barrels per day, down another 190,000 bpd from last month's forecast. The producer group still expects stronger consumption than many other forecasters, including the International Energy Agency, and even raised its demand growth estimate for…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
